recommendations.title: Prince of Darkness
recommendations.overview: A priest discovers an ancient canister containing a strange liquid in an abandoned church. When a group of graduate students and scientists are tasked with studying it, they unknowingly unleash an evil force waiting to destroy all of humanity.

recommendations.title: The Thing
recommendations.overview: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

recommendations.title: Halloween
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween Night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again.

recommendations.title: They Live
recommendations.overview: A lone drifter stumbles upon a unique pair of sunglasses that reveal aliens are systematically gaining control of the Earth by masquerading as humans and lulling the public into submission.

recommendations.title: Someone's Watching Me!
recommendations.overview: A young woman moves to a high-rise apartment building and soon begins to be tormented by an unknown stalker who seems to know her every move.

recommendations.title: Escape from L.A.
recommendations.overview: Into the 9.6-quaked Los Angeles of 2013 comes Snake Plissken. His job: wade through L.A.'s ruined landmarks to retrieve a doomsday device.

recommendations.title: Memoirs of an Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: After a freak accident, an invisible yuppie runs for his life from a treacherous CIA official while trying to cope with his new life.

recommendations.title: Starman
recommendations.overview: When an alien takes the form of a young widow's husband and asks her to drive him from Wisconsin to Arizona, the government tries to stop them.

recommendations.title: In the Mouth of Madness
recommendations.overview: An insurance investigator visits a small town while looking into the strange disappearance of a popular horror novelist. He soon finds that the impact of the author’s books is far more than inspirational.

recommendations.title: Dark Star
recommendations.overview: A group of scientists are sent on a mission to destroy unstable planets. Twenty years into their mission, they have to battle their alien mascot as well as a "sensitive" and intelligent bombing device that starts to question the meaning of its existe
